species: A rare human centenarian variant of SIRT6 enhances genome stability and interaction with Lamin A
cell_type: telomerase‐immortalized human HCA2 fibroblast cell lines
sample_source: This study group consisted of 450 Ashkenazi Jewish centenarians...
